---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature description

A clear, short description of the feature or improvement.

## Use case

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

How you imagine this feature working (UI, API, config, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or other context.
